title: Fix for top level parameter overwrite when a package has the same parameter name (#3241)
body:
@wsnyder the issue was the check for top level module was incomplete. A package was considered a top level module and the corresponding parameter was overwritten in a package parsed before the top level module, instead of in the top level module itself.

Let me know if the fix I made looks reasonable to you. I will also try to add a test for this.
